---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, onboarding flow, or generated agent profiles
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you want in one or two short sentences.

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

Examples:

- the Feishu onboarding is still too hard for beginners
- I want another supported channel
- I want richer agent starter files
- I want better A2A worker role handling

## Proposed Idea

Describe the change you want.

## Who This Helps

Who would benefit most from this?

- complete beginners
- users with existing OpenClaw setups
- Feishu users
- A2A / advanced users
- contributors

## Suggested Scope

What kind of change is this?

- documentation only
- new scripts
- new onboarding flow
- new supported mode
- new channel support
- better generated agent files

## Extra Context

Add examples, screenshots, links, or reference material if helpful.
